subject: Wyndon Stadium — an interior view of a large futuristic tournament arena with a glowing energy field over the battle field
description: The card depicts a stylized interior view of a large modern stadium. A prominent glowing pink-magenta energy field or projection covers the central battle arena area, rendered in vivid neon tones. The stadium architecture has a circular bowl design with tiered seating visible around the edges. The overall palette is bold and saturated with the electric pink field dominating the center. No figures are present — this is a location establishing shot.
foreground: Glowing pink-magenta energy field over the central arena floor
background: Tiered stadium seating, circular bowl architecture
